section_header: Chapter 6: Adapting to the effects of climate change (Adaptation) > 2. Direction and structure of measures
policy_statement: Hiroshima City will implement an Adaptation Plan with two pillars: improving acknowledgement/understanding of climate change and improving regional comprehensive ability to deal with climate risks, and will comprehensively develop three measures under these pillars.
verbatim_text:
Adaptation measures will have 2 pillars as the directions of measures; under those pillars, there are 3 measures that will be comprehensively developed in line with the plan.

<<First Pillar>> Improvement of acknowledgement and understanding of climate change and its effect

<<Second Pillar>> Improvement of regions' comprehensive ability to deal with climate change risks
extraction_rationale: Defines the structured adaptation policy framework that subsequent concrete measures fall under.

section_header: Chapter 6: Adapting to the effects of climate change (Adaptation) > 3. Concrete measures > 1) Creating an environment to promote understanding of climate change and its effect
policy_statement: Hiroshima City will promote creation of an environment for more accurate understanding of climate change and its effects through publicity/education via city media, school sub-readings, and delivery lectures.
parent_statement: Hiroshima City will implement an Adaptation Plan with two pillars: improving acknowledgement/understanding of climate change and improving regional comprehensive ability to deal with climate risks, and will comprehensively develop three measures under these pillars.
verbatim_text:
## 1) Creating an environment to promote understanding of climate change and its effect

Promote the creation of an environment for more accurate understanding of climate change and its effect.

- -New Publicity and education using the city's PR magazine... and the city website,
- -New Preparation of sub-readings available for school education,
- -New Delivery lecture by the city and Hiroshima City Global Warming Countermeasure Regional Council, etc.
extraction_rationale: Concrete adaptation measure with specific delivery channels and tools; linked as a sub-measure under the adaptation framework.

section_header: Chapter 6: Adapting to the effects of climate change (Adaptation) > 3. Concrete measures > 2) Building resilience against climate change
policy_statement: Hiroshima City will advance adaptation measures focusing particularly on natural disaster/coast area, health, and people's life/city life, incorporating an additional 'adaptation' viewpoint into existing disaster prevention and healthcare measures, and steadily promoting selected effective measures from its FY2015 comprehensive strategy.
parent_statement: Hiroshima City will implement an Adaptation Plan with two pillars: improving acknowledgement/understanding of climate change and improving regional comprehensive ability to deal with climate risks, and will comprehensively develop three measures under these pillars.
verbatim_text:
The city will advance measures in 7 areas...; particularly, the city will focus on the items of 'natural disaster/coast area', 'health' and 'people's life/city life' whose damage by climate change has become obvious in the city.

There are many measures that have already been implemented...; however, they will be advanced with the additional 'adaptation' viewpoint.

...the city will conduct the steady promotion.
extraction_rationale: Explicit prioritization and commitment to advance measures with an adaptation lens.

section_header: Chapter 6: Adapting to the effects of climate change (Adaptation) > 3. Concrete measures > 2) Building resilience against climate change
policy_statement: As adaptation measures for increased short-time heavy rain, Hiroshima City will implement city renovation for disaster prevention, construct a disaster information sharing system, and enhance disaster information delivery systems.
parent_statement: Hiroshima City will implement an Adaptation Plan with two pillars: improving acknowledgement/understanding of climate change and improving regional comprehensive ability to deal with climate risks, and will comprehensively develop three measures under these pillars.
verbatim_text:
【 Measures against increase of heavy rain in short time 】

- -City renovation for disaster prevention, construction of disaster information sharing system, enhancement of disaster information delivery system
extraction_rationale: Specific adaptation interventions for extreme rainfall and disasters.

section_header: Chapter 6: Adapting to the effects of climate change (Adaptation) > 3. Concrete measures > 2) Building resilience against climate change
policy_statement: As adaptation measures for health impacts from temperature rise, Hiroshima City will publicize heat disorder risks and provide information for heat disorder prevention.
parent_statement: Hiroshima City will implement an Adaptation Plan with two pillars: improving acknowledgement/understanding of climate change and improving regional comprehensive ability to deal with climate risks, and will comprehensively develop three measures under these pillars.
verbatim_text:
【 Measures against the effect of climate change on health due to the temperature rises, etc. 】

- -Publicity on heat disorder, information provision of heat disorder prevention

section_header: Chapter 6: Adapting to the effects of climate change (Adaptation) > 3. Concrete measures > 2) Building resilience against climate change
policy_statement: As heat/heat-island adaptation measures, Hiroshima City will create a water and green network through conservation/creation of public open spaces and promote roof and wall greening of buildings (including via the green promotion system).
parent_statement: Hiroshima City will implement an Adaptation Plan with two pillars: improving acknowledgement/understanding of climate change and improving regional comprehensive ability to deal with climate risks, and will comprehensively develop three measures under these pillars.
verbatim_text:
【 Countermeasures against heat (heat island phenomenon, etc.) 】

- -Creation of water and green network by the conservation and creation of public open space such as rivers and roads through which the wind passes; promotion of greenery increase on roof and walls of buildings (including those by the green promotion system).
extraction_rationale: Specific urban cooling/heat-island interventions with clear actions.

section_header: Chapter 6: Adapting to the effects of climate change (Adaptation) > 3. Concrete measures > 3) Building of a system to learn and evaluate the effects of climate change
policy_statement: Hiroshima City will cooperate with the state and universities to consider a system to learn and evaluate climate change effects to time and advance adaptation measures appropriately.
parent_statement: Hiroshima City will implement an Adaptation Plan with two pillars: improving acknowledgement/understanding of climate change and improving regional comprehensive ability to deal with climate risks, and will comprehensively develop three measures under these pillars.
verbatim_text:
## 3) Building of a system to learn and evaluate the effects of climate change

In order to prepare for the estimated effects and advance 'adaptation measures' appropriately at a suitable time, the city will cooperate with the state and universities and consider a system to learn and evaluate.
extraction_rationale: Explicit commitment to establish an evaluation/learning system with identified partners.

section_header: Chapter 5: Promotion of counteractions against global warming (Mitigation) > 2. Reduction target for greenhouse gas emissions
policy_statement: Hiroshima City will set greenhouse gas emissions reduction targets of 80% by FY2050, 30% by FY2030, and 5% by FY2020 compared to FY2013 (with FY2020 also equivalent to 7% compared to FY2005).
verbatim_text:
To establish the reduction target of greenhouse gas emissions, the city will set the long-term target based on the national government's target, keeping in mind the city Hiroshima aims to become.

| Timeframe            | Target Year   | Reduction Target (Total Target Amount)            |
| Long-term Target     | FY2050        | Compared to FY2013 ▲ 80%                          |
| Mid-term Target *1   | FY2030        | Compared to FY2013 ▲ 30%                          |
| Short-term Target *2 | FY2020        | Compared to FY2013 ▲ 5% (Compared to FY2005 ▲ 7%) |
extraction_rationale: Clear, quantified citywide mitigation targets with target years and base year.

section_header: Chapter 5: Promotion of counteractions against global warming (Mitigation) > *2 Setting of short-term energy reduction target
policy_statement: Hiroshima City will set a short-term (FY2020) energy-use reduction target of 5% for total energy use not affected by the CO2 emission factor of electric utilities.
verbatim_text:
*2 Setting of short-term energy reduction target

Total amount of energy use that is not affected by the carbon dioxide emission factor of electric utility

- -Total amount of energy use: ▲ 5%
extraction_rationale: Explicit, quantified short-term energy reduction target.

section_header: Chapter 5: Promotion of counteractions against global warming (Mitigation) > ◆ Household > ◇ Key Performance Indicator (KPI)
policy_statement: For households, Hiroshima City sets KPIs including: newly-built ZEH share 50% by FY2020 and almost 100% by FY2030; low-carbon house share 50% by FY2020; household fuel cells total 15,000 by FY2020 and 56,000 by FY2030; and LED adoption (>80% of household lighting) 50% by FY2020 and almost 100% by FY2030.
verbatim_text:
## ◇ Key Performance Indicator (KPI)

| ... | ZEH | 4.3% (FY2015) | 50% | Almost100% |
| ... | Low-carbon house | 1.3% (FY2015) | 50% | - |
| Number of introduced household fuel cells (Total) | ... | 822 (FY2015) | 15,000 | 56,000 |
| Rate of citizens who have introduced LED lighting for more than 80%ofhousehold lighting | ... | 12.5% (FY2016) | 50% | Almost100% |
extraction_rationale: Quantified KPI targets with years provide concrete commitments for household sector implementation.

section_header: Chapter 5: Promotion of counteractions against global warming (Mitigation) > ◆ Business activities > ◇ Key Performance Indicator (KPI)
policy_statement: For business activities, Hiroshima City sets KPIs including Eco Action 21/ISO14001 introductions (500 by FY2020; 1,000 by FY2030), LED lighting use in offices (88.1% by FY2020; almost 100% by FY2030), and BEMS introduction rate (13% by FY2020; 47% by FY2030).
verbatim_text:
## ◇ Key Performance Indicator (KPI)

| No. of introductions of Eco Action 21 and ISO14001 (total) | 370 (FY2015) | 500 | 1,000 |
| Rate of offices that use LED lights for lighting | 52.5% (FY2016) | 88.1% | Almost100% |
| Rate of offices that introduce Business Energy Management System (BEMS) | 2.8% (FY2016) | 13% | 47% |
extraction_rationale: Quantified KPI targets define concrete expected uptake of standards, LEDs, and energy management.

section_header: Chapter 5: Promotion of counteractions against global warming (Mitigation) > ◆ Waste > ◇ Key Performance Indicator (KPI)
policy_statement: For waste, Hiroshima City sets KPIs including reducing waste per person per day to 826 g/person/day by FY2020 and reducing incineration amount to 295,000 ton/year by FY2020.
verbatim_text:
## ◇ Key Performance Indicator (KPI)

| Waste amount per day per person | 859 g/person/day (FY2013) | 826 g/ person/day | - |
| Incineration amount of waste | 304,000 ton/year (FY2013) | 295,000 ton/year | - |
extraction_rationale: Quantified waste prevention KPIs with baseline and target year.

section_header: Chapter 5: Promotion of counteractions against global warming (Mitigation) > ◆ Source of forest absorption /planting trees > ◇ Key Performance Indicator (KPI)
policy_statement: Hiroshima City sets KPIs to increase introduced biomass boilers in city facilities to 3 by FY2020 and 9 by FY2030, and to increase area of park and green spaces to 1,000 ha by FY2020.
verbatim_text:
## ◇ Key Performance Indicator (KPI)

| No. of introduced biomass boilers in the city facilities (cumulative total) | 1 (FY2016) | 3 | 9 |
| Area of park and green spaces | 975.71ha (FY2015) | 1,000ha | - |
extraction_rationale: Quantified KPIs for biomass boiler deployment and greenspace expansion.

section_header: Chapter 5: Promotion of counteractions against global warming (Mitigation) > ◆ Cross-sectional measures > ◇ Key Performance Indicator (KPI)
policy_statement: Hiroshima City sets KPIs for cross-sectional measures: dispersed power introductions in city facilities (1 by FY2020; 8 by FY2030) and smart communities introduced (3 by FY2020; 10 by FY2030).
verbatim_text:
## ◇ Key Performance Indicator (KPI)

| Introduction no. of dispersed power in the city facilities (cumulative total) | 0 (FY2016) | 1 | 8 |
| Introduction no. of smart communities (cumulative total) | 1 (FY2016) | 3 | 10 |
extraction_rationale: Quantified implementation KPIs for smart energy/community systems.

policy_statement: For government operations, Hiroshima City sets targets to reduce greenhouse gas emissions by FY2020 by 5% in the city area and 5.1% for the city office (vs FY2013), and by FY2030 by 30% for both city area and city office (vs FY2013).
verbatim_text:
## 3. Reduction target

| ... | Base Year | Target Year | City area | City office |
| Short-term target | FY2013 | FY2020 | ▲ 5% | ▲ 5.1% |
| Mid-term target | FY2013 | FY2030 | ▲ 30% | ▲ 30% |
extraction_rationale: Quantified emissions reduction targets for municipal operations with specified years.
